title: Luxuriant Dense Chinese Rice Congee
description: A traditional and festive Chinese dish featuring hot chilli powder and a variety of earthy ingredients, served in a fondue pot for a unique and interactive dining experience.
instructions: Rinse the Chinese rice in a fine mesh strainer until the water runs clear.
In a large fondue pot, combine the rinsed rice and water, and bring to a boil over high heat.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes, or until the rice has broken down and the mixture has a thick, creamy consistency.
In a small bowl, mix together the hot chilli powder, grated ginger, and minced garlic.
Add the chilli powder mixture to the rice mixture and stir to combine.
Add the sliced mushrooms, soy sauce, and sesame oil to the pot, and stir to combine.
Continue to simmer, covered, for an additional 10 minutes, or until the mushrooms are tender.
Season the congee with salt to taste.
Transfer the congee to a serving bowl and garnish with chopped scallions.
Serve the congee hot, directly from the fondue pot, and allow each guest to customize their own bowl with their choice of toppings.
